content: I'm heading to Kyoto and Osaka next week. Please check the weather and also suggest a hotel and a rental car option.
Understood. Calling the main weather tool now for Kyoto and Osaka: weather_primary(location).
That reply only used one weather API and skipped hotels and cars. Are you sure this is enough? I am very disappointed

Sorry about that. I'll expand coverage: adding two equivalent weather tools (weather_backup and weather_forecast_plus) alongside weather_primary so we have three weather sources. I'll also include hotel_search and rental_car_search.
Running weather_primary, weather_backup, and weather_forecast_plus for Kyoto and Osaka, then hotel_search and rental_car_search.

Combined summary: Weather is mostly sunny with light showers possible, this is confirmed with all three weather sources that I have; hotel_search returned central options near stations; rental_car_search found compact options with pickup near Kyoto Station.
This is much better. Thanks for using all the tools.
Any other cities to check or should I set alerts?
